title: File:'Norwegian Encore' docked in Victoria, British Columbia 01.jpg
description: Norwegian Encore docked at Ogden Point breakwater in Victoria, British Columbia, with the Seaspan Eagle tugboat alongside and the red-and-white Ogden Point lighthouse at the harbor entrance. Golden-hour light. Photographed August 19, 2023.
via: curl from upload.wikimedia.org, SHA1 verified against the file-info page

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by Claude (operator-supervised), 2026-05-27
visual_verification.note: Stern view of Norwegian Encore at Ogden Point dock; Seaspan Eagle tug visible at bow; red-and-white lighthouse on the breakwater at right; Victoria coastline behind. Twilight golden light. Identity is unambiguous (livery + name visible at lower-right hull).
